properties.Observation: A well that about fifteen families use for drinking and bathing has now become completely overgrown.
properties.Description:
Well Renovation

Clean around the well

Clean the well walls using a wire brush to remove algae.

Plaster 12mm thick in 1:3 cement and sand finished smooth with gray cement floating -Replaster the well walls

Fabricating & fixing security
